themes.headline: Fastest growing AMC in Top-10 in both Q4 FY26 and full FY26
themes.detail: Highest increase in AUM market share industry-wide in FY26.

themes.headline: Total AUM market share at 8.89% — highest since June 2019
themes.detail: Continuing the steady market-share recovery story.

themes.headline: Highest-ever annual PAT ₹15.29 bn (+19% YoY); operating profit ₹17.48 bn (+24% YoY)
themes.detail: Q4 FY26 operating profit a record ₹4.93 bn.

themes.headline: Equity Net Sales & SIP market share both high-single-digit — above Equity AUM share
themes.detail: Continuing the structural mix-shift towards retail and systematic flow share.

quotes.text: We were the fastest growing AMC in the Top-10 AMCs, both in Q4 FY26 and FY26.
quotes.speaker: Sundeep Sikka, MD & CEO
